title: DermaZeal Clinic is a dermatology Clinic located at HSR Layout, Bangalore, India, offering international quality skin and hair care.
description: DermaZeal Clinic is a dermatology Clinic located at HSR Layout, Bangalore, India, offering international quality skin and hair care.
text: DermaZeal Clinic is a dermatology Clinic located at HSR Layout, Bangalore, India, offering international quality skin and hair care. #422, 1st Floor, 27th Main Road, Next To ICICI Bank,1st Sector, HSR Layout, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560102 080-42106262 , 080-48141879, 9008624202 contact@dermazealClinic.com Mon-Sat: 09:00AM - 08:00PM Sunday: 09:00AM - 05:00PM APPOINTMENT 080 4814 1879,    080 4210626 +91-9008624202 Book Appointment Home DermaZeal Clinic Our Doctors Medical Dermatology Psoriasis Fungal Infection Hair Loss Growth Factor Treatment Alopecia Areata Atopic Eczema Patch Test Keloids Rosacea Urticaria Sun Allergies Vitiligo Cosmetic Dermatology Laser Hair Removal Acne Scar Reduction Pigmentation Tattoo Removal Skin Tag & Skin Growth Removal Carbon Laser Peel Fractional CO2 Laser Microdermabrasion Chemical Peels Dark Circle Removal Oxy Peel Photo Facial Anti Wrinkle Injections Blog Contacts Welcome    to DermaZeal Clinic Know more Experience Healthy Skin and Hair Know more We Provide Full Skin and Hair Care Know more Wave of Confidence Know more Move Over Razor Make Space for Laser Know more Peel away Damaged Skin Know more Welcome to DermaZeal Clinic DermaZeal Clinic is a state of the art futuristic Clinic which offers excellent solutions to all dermatological, cosmetological & hair related concerns. Situated along the 27th main road, Sector-1, HSR Layout, Bangalore, DermaZeal Clinic is spacious with modern infrastructure and hi-tech facilities. At DermaZeal Clinic we utilize the most current, safe and effective treatment options available, including numerous advanced laser treatment systems that work to achieve the specific desired results. Our Team of tactful and skilled dermatologists provide excellent personal care towards every patient to cater accordingly to their dermatological, cosmetological and hair related concerns. Our Services Medical Dermatology Medical Dermatology is the practice of diagnosing and treating conditions of skin, hair and nails. At DermaZeal Clinic, our dermatologists couple their broad knowledge base along with their adequate time and care towards each patient to provide the most appropriate line of treatment. Read More Cosmetic Dermatology Cosmetic Dermatology focuses on the improvement and enhancement of skin and hair to keep oneself looking young and beautiful. Treatments such as acne scar treatment, photo facial, laser hair removal  aim at refreshing and rejuvenating skin and reducing imperfections	. Read More Why Choose Us? High Standard of Patient Care At DermaZeal Clinic we strive to achieve the highest standards of personalised and dedicated care to our patients ensuring an exceptional experience. Committed  Team Our team of zealous doctors and support staff are diligent towards ensuring that we provide excellent solutions to all dermatology and cosmetology related concerns Modern Equipment DermaZeal Clinic is a futuristic Clinic with state-of-the-art medical equipment ensuring safe cost effective treatments keeping up with the latest standards. Patient Testimonials Excellent treatment facility for all skin and hair related issues. I have been visiting DermaZeal clinic for my acne and scars, I took few sessions of chemical peels along with medicines, my acne has completely cleared. I have started with fractional CO2 laser for my scars, I could see visible reduction in my scars within few sessions. The clinic is very clean and hygienic. The staff and doctors are very friendly and polite Shanaya I would recommend DermaZeal Clinic for pigmentation, blemishes, dark patches and uneven dull skin. I was suggested by the doctor for Q-switched ND-YAG Laser, within 5 sessions my pigmentation and dark patches had reduced very nicely. The Doctors are very professional, and the clinic is well equipped with the best facilities, not to mention their beautiful ambience. Varun Kumar I got my skin tags removal done at DermaZeal clinic, HSR Layout. Treatment was completely painless. I had several skin tags around my face and neck and got them all removed at one session. I feel so good about my skin now. Thanks to DermaZeal Clinic and Doctors there. Jennifer Thomas I had severe hair loss. Doctor asked me to do a few tests and started me on treatment based on my reports. I am happy I came across DermaZeal Clinic at the right time. The Clinic has very professional approach and attends to each and every patient with great care.
